title: Peppery Tender Tunisian Haddock Stir-fry
description: A delicious and comforting peppery stir-fry featuring tender smoked haddock in a raw-friendly recipe that captures the essence of nostalgic Tunisian cuisine.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Season haddock fillets with salt and black pepper on both sides.
Add haddock to the skillet, cooking for about 2 minutes per side or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add red bell peppers and sauté for about 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in cilantro, green onions, and lemon juice. Cook for an additional minute.
Add red pepper flakes, dijon mustard, haddock fillets back into the pan, and stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 2-3 minutes or until the flavors are fully integrated.
Serve hot with a side of garlic naan bread.
